chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2623 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 13795/16 2. For Katcha Peshi. 07.02.2018. Mr. Raja H. R Naurang advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G and Syed Meeral Shah A.P.G. Learned Counsel for the petitioner has pointed out that petitioner Muhammad Ayoob has been murdered 4/5 months back, therefore, according to him, this petition has become infructuous and the same may be disposed of. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of having become infructuous alongwith listed application. However, the legal heirs of petitioner may file any direct complaint before the concerned court for redressal of their grievance, if any, if law permits and on filing such complaint the trial court shall decide the same in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
